api_control.label: API Control
api_control.description: Connection settings and Meta Cloud API integration status.

WhatsAppOverview.title: WhatsApp Overview
WhatsAppOverview.placeholder: WhatsApp Ecommerce Channel Overview - Statistics and AI Insights coming soon.

WhatsAppOnboarding.title: Connect WhatsApp Business
WhatsAppOnboarding.description: Bring your own number to Huzilerz and power it with AI.

steps.link_description: Log in with Facebook to select your WhatsApp Business Account and phone number.

checklist.title: Before You Connect
checklist.warning: CRITICAL: If this number is active on a mobile app, you MUST delete the account first. Simply uninstalling is not enough.
checklist.learning: What is BYON? This allows you to use your existing business number with our professional AI tools, but it will no longer work on the standard WhatsApp mobile apps.
checklist.note: You will need a personal Facebook account to manage the Business ID.
checklist.item_delete: I have deleted my WhatsApp account from my phone OR this is a clean number.
checklist.item_facebook: I have a Facebook account ready.
checklist.item_ready: I am ready to receive a 6-digit verification code.

verify.title: Verify Your Number
verify.description: Choose how you want to receive your 6-digit verification code.
verify.voice_description: Receive a phone call with the code
verify.code_sent_to: We've sent a code to your number ending in {digits}

errors.no_account: No account selected or ID missing.
errors.connect_failed: Failed to connect account. Please try again.
errors.verify_failed: Verification failed. Check the code and try again.

WhatsAppOnboarding.footer_terms: By connecting your WhatsApp account, you agree to Meta's Business Terms and our integration policies.

WhatsAppAccount.title: WhatsApp Account
WhatsAppAccount.api_info: Your account is connected to the Huzilerz WhatsApp Cloud. All incoming messages will be handled by the AI as per your settings in the Workman dashboard.

cards.brain_description: AI use your store memory to reply.
